name: twinkle
description: Stochastic spawn-and-fade. ~50% chance per tick to pick a random LED; if its current PWM < 20, write a random 0..1 level. Then global slow decay (×768/769 ≈ 0.9987). Mirrors firmware case 0x01.

tracks._comment: Respawn check + write. Registered first; consumes 1 RNG draw (spawn check), then on 50% pass: 2 more draws (layer, light), then if dark enough 1 more draw (level).
